title: Elevated Risk Assessment
scenario: Assess the risk of a company going bankrupt based on the following factors: 'debt-to-equity ratio', 'interest coverage ratio', 'current ratio', and 'EBITDA margin'. Use a weighted scoring system to calculate the overall risk score and provide a recommendation to the management team.
constraints: The markdown document should contain at least 3 tables.
The recommendation should include a specific action plan.

evaluationCriteria.description: The output meets all constraints specified in the prompt.
The risk assessment accurately reflects the company's financial situation.
The recommendation is clear, actionable, and relevant to the company's situation.
